heading: Effect of changes in titles of appropriations
label: 1303 Effect of changes in titles of appropriations
text: Expenditures for a particular object or purpose authorized by a law (and referred to in that law by the specific title previously used for the appropriation item in the appropriation law concerned) may be made from a corresponding appropriation item when the specific title is changed or eliminated from a later appropriation law.
